name: Asparagus Braise
recipeIngredient: 1/2 lb Asparagus, thinly sliced on the diagonal
recipeInstructions:
1. Clean and prepare the vegetables.
2. Heat oil in a wok until it reaches the smoking point. Stir fry the asparagus in the wok for about 2 minutes. Reduce heat to low medium, cover the wok, and cook the asparagus for an additional 5 minutes, lifting the cover 3-4 times to stir. At the end of 5 minutes, add all other ingredients except cashews, raising the heat by one notch. Stir fry for 3 minutes with the cover over the wok. Lift the cover at least once or twice to stir the vegetables so they are cooked through. Place the food in a platter and sprinkle cashews on top if desired.
3. Note: This is a lovely party dish, especially in spring when asparagus is available.
